race.comment: ZOU DOLL (12) settled back but kept coming to finish fifth over 1150m at Gold Coast Poly last start. Finds a nice race and can take this out. FANCI FLEUR (9) was out of the money when resuming from a spell last start over 800m at Warwick. Strips fitter and can find the winners' list. SO BE INSPIRED (2) turned in a nice effort to score two runs ago at Ballina. Safely held last time out when third over 1200m at this track. Faces an easier assignment so she is a leading contender. PAPARACHA (1) progressive type who opened this prep in good style, scoring by 1.75 lengths over 1111m at Murwillumbah. Include.
